picker.reasonTooShort: Reason must be at least {{min}} characters.

VIEWER.name: Viewer
VIEWER.description: Read-only — can see information but cannot modify anything.

HOST.name: Host
HOST.description: Customer-facing — seats guests and manages reservations.

WAITER.name: Waiter
WAITER.description: Day-to-day service — takes orders and processes payments.

CASHIER.name: Cashier
CASHIER.description: Processes payments and manages the register.

KITCHEN.name: Kitchen
KITCHEN.description: Kitchen operations — receives orders and marks them ready.

MANAGER.name: Manager
MANAGER.description: Supervises staff and accesses venue reports.

OWNER.name: Owner
OWNER.description: Full venue access — including billing and permissions.
